Class need

java.lang.Object
sims.needs.need
public class need extends Object
Represents a basic need in the Sims world, such as hunger, energy, or fun. A need has a value, a decay rate, and a threshold that determines when the need becomes critical.

This class provides methods to adjust the need's value, apply decay over time, and check whether the need has fallen below its threshold.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    need()
    Constructs a default need with: Initial value = 80 Decay rate = 0.5 Threshold = 30
    need(double rate)
    Constructs a need with a custom decay rate.
    need(int value, int decayRate, double threshold)
    Constructs a need with specific values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getDecayRate()
    Returns the decay rate of the need.
    double
    getValue()
    Returns the current value of the need.
    boolean
    performDecay()
    Applies decay to the need by reducing its value according to the decay rate.
    void
    setValue(Double modify)
    Modifies the value of the need by the specified amount.

  • Constructor Details

    • need

      public need()
      Constructs a default need with:
      • Initial value = 80
      • Decay rate = 0.5
      • Threshold = 30

    • need

      public need(double rate)
      Constructs a need with a custom decay rate. The initial value is set to 80 and the threshold to 30.
      Parameters:
      rate - the decay rate

    • need

      public need(int value, int decayRate, double threshold)
      Constructs a need with specific values.
      Parameters:
      value - the initial value of the need
      decayRate - the rate at which the need decays
      threshold - the threshold below which the need is critical

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      public double getValue()
      Returns the current value of the need.
      Returns:
      the need value

    • getDecayRate

      public double getDecayRate()
      Returns the decay rate of the need.
      Returns:
      the decay rate

    • setValue

      public void setValue(Double modify)
      Modifies the value of the need by the specified amount. The value is clamped between 0 and 100.
      Parameters:
      modify - the amount to adjust the need value

    • performDecay

      public boolean performDecay()
      Applies decay to the need by reducing its value according to the decay rate. Returns whether the need has fallen below its threshold.
      Returns:
      true if the need value is below the threshold, false otherwise
